title: BibiMinez Server Pack
description: The official modpack for the BibiMinez SMP community server!
body:
Required Manual Downloads:

[Immersive Engineering - Pam's Compatibility  Patch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering-cloche-and-pams-harvestcraft/files/6745602)

[Pam's Harvestcraft 2 - Fantasy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-fantasy/files/6680338)

🌟 Bibiminez Modpack – A Whimsical World of Engineering, Farming, and Fantasy!

Welcome to the Bibiminez server, where creativity meets chaos in the most delightful way. This custom modpack is designed to offer a rich, immersive sandbox experience that blends mechanical ingenuity, cozy farming, high-flying adventure, and a touch of magical charm.

🛠️ Core Features:

Create Mod – At the heart of Bibiminez lies the Create mod, empowering players to build intricate contraptions, kinetic machines, and automated systems with stunning visual flair. From rotating gearboxes to elegant train networks, engineering has never been so satisfying.

Farmer’s Delight – Embrace the pastoral life with expanded cooking, crop variety, and kitchen tools. Grow, harvest, and prepare hearty meals that bring warmth to your homestead and utility to your gameplay.

✈️ Planes and Aerial Exploration – Take to the skies with flyable aircraft that let you soar across the landscape. Perfect for scouting new biomes, delivering goods, or just enjoying the view from above.

🧱 Expanded Building Materials – Unleash your inner architect with a vast palette of blocks, textures, and decorative elements. From rustic cabins to futuristic factories, the possibilities are endless.

🧹 Touhou Maid Mod – Add a whimsical twist with loyal Touhou maids who assist in combat, chores, and companionship. Their quirky personalities and stylish outfits bring a splash of anime charm to your world.

🎮 Why Bibiminez?

Bibiminez isn’t just a modpack—it’s a community-driven playground where players can collaborate, innovate, and express themselves. Whether you're a redstone wizard, a cottagecore farmer, or a skybound explorer, this server has something for everyone.
